T01_TOWN_16_message.message1: I want to see those two again.
This town is easy to live in. It's a good place, I've taken a liking to it.
Puppets are very delicate. Even the smallest negligence in maintenance can cause them to malfunction.
Where should I hold my next puppet show... The plaza...? Or maybe I can use the church for it...
Is Plachta doing well? ...I see, that's good.
Ah, welcome. Are you here to see my puppet show? ...You'll pass? I see...
Maybe I should take a walk... But I also want to work on my dolls... Hmm...

T01_TOWN_16_message.message2: Did you bring the item I requested?
Did you bring the item I requested?
Did you bring the item I requested?

T01_TOWN_16_message.message1: I look forward to the next puppet show.
I look forward to the next puppet show.
